updates.text: We joined the adventure league! I got to actually play this time because I could hit the baddies. I can hit hard IF I hit!!!!. We met a druid hermit and saved the forest creatures and learned the big bad's name ohhh.
We finished up our tutorial sessions by beating a turtle dragon/dragon turtle??? And then I got cursed with a mf ring that makes me sink to the bottom of any water :')
